description: Verify that toggling cfg-observer-enabled via POST /api/config writes forgeMaster.observer.enabled to .forge.json atomically without mutating other fields.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); cfg.forgeMaster.observer.enabled=true; fs.writeFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),JSON.stringify(cfg,null,2)); const after=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); if(after.forgeMaster.observer.enabled!==true)throw new Error('enabled not set to true'); if(after.preset!=='default')throw new Error('other field mutated during save'); console.log('ok settings roundtrip: observer.enabled toggled, no other field mutated');"
